title: Cinematic Movie Poster With Powerful Female Lead
sourceTitle: Image To Image Queen Of Spades Sorcerer Movie Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image hyper-realistic cinematic movie poster using uploaded face reference before Queen of Spades sorcerer movie poster transformation, preserving same woman from the uploaded reference photo as a powerful female sorcerer bursting through a cracked Queen of Spades playing card. Subject: same woman from the uploaded reference photo keeps the same facial structure and likeness as the uploaded reference photo while wearing ornate royal maroon and gold embroidered medieval fantasy jacket with rich fabric texture and intricate regal detailing and extending one glowing hand toward the viewer. Scene: Cracked Queen of Spades card explodes outward with stone fragments, dust, debris frozen mid-air, dark moody background, volumetric light rays, golden sparks, and dark arcane aura. Composition: Cinematic hero framing with the sorcerer emerging through the card, intense piercing gaze, one hand forward with magical energy, high contrast motion debris, and shallow cinematic depth of field. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image queen of spades sorcerer movie poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Photorealistic face, epic fantasy realism, dynamic movie poster composition, dramatic chiaroscuro, ultra-detailed textures, 8K sharp focus, cinematic color grading, and masterpiece fantasy finish. Color Palette: Royal maroon, antique gold embroidery, dark moody blacks, Queen of Spades card whites and blacks, golden magic sparks, stone dust grays, and warm volumetric light. Lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, focused face readability, glowing hand energy, volumetric light rays, debris rim light, and high-contrast poster exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
